rulings.Case Title: LINDA NUSSBAUM VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ( A PUBLIC ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: DENY - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND PG&E. TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER THE CITY CREATED THE DANGEROUS CONDITION AND/OR HAD NOTICE OF THE CONDITION. (SEE THE PHIL PARKER DECLARATION.) TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER PG&E CREATED THE CONTITION. DENY CONTINUANCE OF MOTION IN VIEW OF TRIAL DATE. (302/REQ/PB)

BARBARA DAVISON VS. ANVIL INDUSTRIES, INC.,INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESS et al
rulings.Rulings: DENY - FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. (1) CANNOT RELY ON DECEDENT'S WIFE WHEN DEPOSITION FROM SON AND THREE OTHER WITNESSES SHOW DECEDENT REPLACED ORIGINAL EQUIPMENT. (2) DEFENDANT DOESN'T DISCOUNT DECEDENT EXPOSED TO BORG PRODUCTS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/HE)
